Klasse SYX

java.lang.Object
de.btu.kt.syx.SYX
public class SYX extends Object
SYX constants and static utilities
Autor:
Matthias Wolff

  • Feldübersicht

    Felder
    Modifizierer und Typ
    Feld
    Beschreibung
    static final int
    CREATE
    Option for SYX.getPath(...): Create resource (folder); default is do not create.
    static final String
    E_ARG_BADLEN
    Error detail message format string.
    static final String
    E_ARG_DUPVAL
    Error detail message format string.
    static final String
    E_ARG_INVAL
    Error detail message format string.
    static final String
    E_ARG_NEG
    Error detail message format string.
    static final String
    E_ARG_NULL
    Error detail message format string.
    static final String
    E_ARG_NULLEMPTY
    Error detail message format string.
    static final String
    E_ARG_TOOSHORT
    Error detail message format string.
    static final String
    E_ARGS_DIFFLEN
    Error detail message format string.
    static final int
    ROOT
    Option for SYX.getPath(...): Path relative to the root if the binary tree or source tree, default is relative to class file.
    static final int
    SOURCE
    Option for SYX.getPath(...): Path in source tree; default is in binary tree.

  • Methodendetails

    • bSet

      public static byte bSet(byte b, int pos, boolean val) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Sets or clears a bit in a byte.
      Parameter:
      b - The byte to write into
      pos - The bit in b to set or clear, 0...7
      val - The new bit value
      Gibt zurück:
      The modified value of b
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if pos is out of range

    • bSet

      public static byte bSet(byte b, int pos, int val)
      Sets or clears a bit in a byte.
      Parameter:
      b - The source byte
      pos - The bit to set or clear, 0...7
      val - The new bit value, 1 iff val!=0 and 0 otherwise
      Gibt zurück:
      The modified byte
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if pos is out of range

    • bSet

      public static byte bSet(byte b, int pos) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Sets a bit in a byte.
      Parameter:
      b - The source byte
      pos - The bit to set, 0...7
      Gibt zurück:
      The modified byte
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if pos is out of range

    • bSet

      public static int bSet(int w, int pos, boolean val)
      Sets or clears a bit in a word.
      Parameter:
      w - The source word
      pos - The bit to set or clear, 0...31
      val - The new bit value
      Gibt zurück:
      The modified word
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if pos is out of range

    • bSet

      public static int bSet(int w, int pos, int val)
      Sets or clears a bit in a word.
      Parameter:

      pos - The bit to set or clear, 0...31
      val - The new bit value, 1 iff val!=0 and 0 otherwise
      Gibt zurück:
      The modified word
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if pos is out of range

      Converts a byte to a hexadecimal number string.

      b - The byte
      Gibt zurück:
      The string representation, "00"..."FF"

    • b2sB

      public static String b2sB(byte b)
      Converts a byte to a binary number string.
      Parameter:
      b - The byte
      Gibt zurück:
      The string representation, "00000000"..."11111111"

    • s2bH

      public static byte s2bH(String s) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Converts a string representing a hexadecimal number to a byte.
      Parameter:
      s - The string, "00"..."FF" case does no matter
      Gibt zurück:
      The byte
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if s cannot be converted to a byte

    • s2bB

      public static byte s2bB(String s) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Converts a string representing a binary number to a byte.
      Parameter:
      s - The string, "00000000"..."11111111"
      Gibt zurück:
      The byte
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if s cannot be converted to a byte

    • valueIn

      public static boolean valueIn(int val, int valMin, int valMax)
      Checks whether an integer value is permissible.
      Parameter:
      val - The value
      valMin - The smallest permissible value
      valMax - The greatest permissible value
      Gibt zurück:
      true if the value is permissible, false otherwise

    • valueIn

      public static boolean valueIn(int val, int[] permissible)
      Checks whether an integer value is permissible.
      Parameter:
      val - The value
      permissible - An array of permissible midiValues
      Gibt zurück:
      true if the value is permissible, false otherwise

    • getIntRange

      public static int[] getIntRange(int valMin, int valMax)
      Returns a range of integers.
      Parameter:
      valMin - The smallest value of the range
      valMax - The greatest value of the range (inclusive)
      Gibt zurück:
      The array [valMin,valMax]

    • encodeDetune

      public static final float encodeDetune(int pol, int semitones, int cents) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Encodes detuning model values into a float.
      Parameter:
      pol - The detune polarity ∈ { -1, +1 }
      semitones - The number of semitones, non-negative
      cents - The number of cents ∈ [0,99]
      Gibt zurück:
      The detuning in semitones, decimal places denote fine detuning in cents
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any argument is out of range
      Siehe auch:
      • decodeDetunePol(float)
      • decodeDetuneSemitones(float)
      • decodeDetuneCents(float)

    • decodeDetunePol

      public static final int decodeDetunePol(float detune)
      Decodes the detune polarity encoded in a float value.
      Parameter:
      detune - The detuning in semitones, decimal places denote fine detuning in cents
      Gibt zurück:
      The detune polarity ∈ { -1, +1 }
      Siehe auch:
      • encodeDetune(int, int, int)
      • decodeDetuneSemitones(float)
      • decodeDetuneCents(float)

    • decodeDetuneSemitones

      public static final int decodeDetuneSemitones(float detune)
      Decodes the number of detuning semitones encoded in a float value.
      Parameter:
      detune - The detuning in semitones, decimal places denote fine detuning in cents
      Gibt zurück:
      The number of semitones, non-negative
      Siehe auch:
      • encodeDetune(int, int, int)
      • decodeDetunePol(float)
      • decodeDetuneCents(float)

      public static final int decodeDetuneCents(float detune)

      Parameter:
      detune - The detuning in semitones, decimal places denote fine detuning in cents
      Gibt zurück:
      The number of cents ∈ [0,99]

      public static Error InternalError(String message)
      Returns an error object for internal errors.

      message - Error message; may be null or empty
      Gibt zurück:
      the error object

      public static Error InternalError(Throwable cause)
      Returns an error object for internal errors.
      Parameter:

      Gibt zurück:
      the error object

    • IllArgExc

      public static IllegalArgumentException IllArgExc(String format, Object... args)
      Returns an IllegalArgumentException with a formatted detail message.

      The method is equivalent to

      new IllegalArgumentException(String.format(format,args))

      Usage:
           throw SYX.IllArgExc(format,args);
      Parameter:
      format - The message format string
      args - The arguments
      Gibt zurück:
      the Exception

    • NotSuppExc

      public static NotSupportedException NotSuppExc(String format, Object... args)
      Returns an InvalidMidiDataException with a formatted detail message.

      The method is equivalent to

      new InvalidMidiDataException(String.format(format,args))

      Usage:
           throw SYX.InvMdataExc(format,args);
      Parameter:
      format - The message format string
      args - The arguments
      Gibt zurück:
      the Exception

    • InvMdataExc

      public static InvalidMidiDataException InvMdataExc(String format, Object... args)
      Returns an InvalidMidiDataException with a formatted detail message.

      The method is equivalent to

      new InvalidMidiDataException(String.format(format,args))

      Usage:
           throw SYX.InvMdataExc(format,args);
      Parameter:
      format - The message format string
      args - The arguments
      Gibt zurück:
      The Exception

    • doAssert

      public static void doAssert(boolean condition, String message)
      Throws an error iff condition is false.
      Parameter:
      condition - The condition
      message - An assertion message; may be null or empty

    • doAssert

      public static void doAssert(boolean condition)
      Throws an error iff condition is false. Convenience shortcut for doAssert (condition,null).
      Parameter:
      condition - The condition

    • prettyPrintByteArray

      public static String prettyPrintByteArray(byte[] data, String linePrefix)
      Pretty-prints a byte array to a string.
      Parameter:
      data - The byte array
      linePrefix - A prefix string for printed lines (not applied to the first line)
      Gibt zurück:
      The printed string

    • prettyPrintMidiMessage

      public static String prettyPrintMidiMessage(MidiMessage message, long timeStamp)
      Pretty-prints a MidiMessage.
      Parameter:
      message - The MIDI message
      timeStamp - The message's time stamp, -1 for unknown
      Gibt zurück:
      The printed string

    • prettyPrintMidiMessage

      public static String prettyPrintMidiMessage(MidiMessage message)
      Pretty-prints a MidiMessage.
      Parameter:
      message - The MIDI message
      Gibt zurück:
      The printed string

    • getHostName

      public static String getHostName()
      Returns the host name.

      Source:

      Recommended way to get hostname in Java, comment of Dan Ortega

      Gibt zurück:
      the host name

    • getPath

      public static String getPath(Class<?> clazz, String relpath, int options)
      Returns an absolute path relative to a class file.

      Examples:

           // Get path relative to a class file in the source tree:
     SYX.getPath(clazz,relpath,SYX.SOURCE);
 
     // Get ORK source root folder
     SYX.getPath(ORK.class,"",SYX.SOURCE));
 
     // Get ORK temporary folder
     SYX.getPath(ORK.class,"../tmp",SYX.ROOT));
 
     // Get ORK resources folder in binary tree
     SYX.getPath(ORK.class,"resources",0));
 
     // Get subfolder in ORK tmporary folder (create if not exists)
     SYX.getPath(ORK.class,"../tmp/delete me!/foo/bar",SYX.ROOT|SYX.CREATE));
 
     // Get SYX binary root folder without specifying class and relative path
     SYX.getPath(null,null,0));
      Parameter:
      clazz - The class. If null, SYX.class will be used.
      relpath - The path relative to the binary or source file of clazz. If null or empty, the method returns the path to the folder containing the class file.
      options - Options, any bitwise combination of SYX.SOURCE, SYX.ROOT and SYX.CREATE
      Gibt zurück:
      A valid, absolute path
      Löst aus:
      Error - if the path could not be determined, or if the path does not exist (options&SYX.CREATE==0), or if the path could not be created (options&SYX.CREATE!=0)

    • getFileExtension

      public static String getFileExtension(String filename)
      Returns the file extension.
      Parameter:
      filename - The file name
      Gibt zurück:
      the file extension
